label: Infrastructure
current_description: Infrastructure provides the foundation for communities to live, work, and access essential resources in wildfire-prone places.
revised_description: Infrastructure provides the foundation for communities to live, work, and access essential resources in wildfire-prone places.

label: Status
revised_description: (since it is grayed out, a box could appear when it gets hovered over). Not assessed. Instead, it is evaluated based on where structures are.

label: Resilience
current_description: Infrastructure capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Capacity of buildings to resist burning, and for the community to rebuild

label: Building Codes
revised_description: Alignment of state-level building codes with IWUIC code standards

label: Wildland Urban Interface
current_description: Exposure in the wildland-urban interface zone.
revised_description: Proportion of structures in the wildland urban interface

label: Road Access
current_description: Evacuation route accessibility and egress capacity.
revised_description: Community meets minimum six-road access threshold

label: Fire Fighting Access
current_description: Fire resource density and response capability.

label: Recovery
current_description: Capacity to recover infrastructure after wildfire.
revised_description: Capacity of a community to rebuild infrastructure after wildfire

label: Communities
current_description: Communities captures the social and civic capacity to prepare for, respond to, and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Communities captures the social and civic capacity to prepare for and recover from wildfire.

label: Resilience
current_description: Community capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Community capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.

label: Community Wildfire Protection Plans
current_description: Presence of Community Wildfire Protection Plans.
revised_description: Presence of Community Wildfire Protection Plans.

label: Evacuation Routes
revised_description: Community meets minimum six-road access threshold

label: Recovery
current_description: Community capacity to recover after wildfire.
revised_description: Community capacity to recover after wildfire.

label: Income
revised_description: Composite indicator of ommunity income, including both houseoholds >200k and below the poverty level

label: Livelihoods
current_description: Livelihoods reflects how wildfire affects jobs, income stability, and local economic recovery.
revised_description: Livelihoods reflects how wildfire affects jobs, income stability, and local economic recovery.

label: Housing Burden
current_description: Housing cost burden as percentage of income.
revised_description: Fraction of population that is house burdened (>30% income)

label: Resilience
current_description: Economic capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Economic capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.

label: Sense of Place
current_description: Sense of Place reflects the resilience of culturally and ecologically meaningful places and species that shape identity.
revised_description: Sense of Place captures culturally and ecologically meaningful places and species that shape identity.

label: Iconic Places
current_description: Nationally recognized iconic places resilience to wildfire.

label: Status
current_description: Presence and status of iconic places.

label: Places Presence
current_description: Presence of nationally recognized iconic places.

label: Resilience
current_description: Iconic places capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Iconic places capacity to resist damage/loss and recover from wildfire.

label: Resistance
current_description: Resistance to wildfire impacts on iconic places.
revised_description: Resistance of iconic places, both natural and built, to wildfire

label: WUI Exposure
revised_description: Proportion of iconic places in the WUI

label: Road Access
revised_description: Place meets minimum six-road access threshold

label: Fire Access
current_description: Fire resource access to iconic places.

label: Structures
revised_description: Resistance of built iconic places to wildfire

label: Nat'l Parks
revised_description: Resistance of natural iconic places to wildfire

label: Protection
current_description: Level of protection for iconic places.
revised_description: Level of protection for iconic places.

label: Nat'l Parks
revised_description: Recovery potential for natural iconic places.

label: Iconic Species
revised_description: Reslience of iconic species to wildfire

label: Resilience
current_description: Iconic species capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Iconic species capacity to resist harm and potential recovery capacity from wildfire.

label: Species
current_description: Species measures conservation status and fire-related traits that influence how species resist and recover after wildfire.
revised_description: Species measures conservation status and fire-related traits that influence how species resist and recover after wildfire.

label: Resilience
current_description: Species capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Species capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.

label: Habitats
current_description: Habitats evaluates ecosystem condition and recovery potential to understand how wildfire affects landscape integrity.
revised_description: Habitats evaluates vegetation extent and capacity to resist wildfire as well as recovery potential

label: Status
revised_description: Status reflects the current extent of the habitat compared to its historic extent

label: Resilience
current_description: Habitat capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.
revised_description: Habitat capacity to resist and recover from wildfire.

label: Tree Traits
current_description: Tree species traits conferring fire resistance.

label: Vapor Pressure Deficit
current_description: Vapor pressure deficit indicating drought stress.
revised_description: Vapor pressure deficit associated with increased fire

label: Water
current_description: Water tracks resilience in freshwater systems that communities and ecosystems rely on before and after wildfire.
revised_description: Water tracks quantity and timing in freshwater systems as well as the ability to supply freshwater for human needs

label: Status
revised_description: Quantiy and timing of water on the landscape

label: Resilience
current_description: Capacity to maintain water resources during and after wildfires.
revised_description: Capacity to maintain safe water supplies during and after wildfires.

label: Resistance
current_description: Ability to resist water quality and quantity impacts.
revised_description: Ability to resist distrupted freshwater supply.

label: Drought Plans
current_description: State and local drought planning coverage.
revised_description: Comprehensivness of state water management plans.

label: Air Quality
current_description: Air Quality measures smoke exposure risk and health-related capacity to withstand wildfire-driven air pollution.
revised_description: Air Quality measures exposure to poor air quality as well as capacity to withstand negative health impacts.

label: Days AQI > 100
current_description: Number of days with Air Quality Index exceeding 100 (unhealthy for sensitive groups).
revised_description: Number of days with Air Quality Index exceeding 100 (unhealthy for sensitive groups).

label: Days AQI > 300
current_description: Number of days with Air Quality Index exceeding 300 (hazardous).
revised_description: Number of days with Air Quality Index exceeding 300 (hazardous for all groups).

label: Resilience
current_description: Capacity to resist and recover from air quality impacts.
revised_description: Capacity to resist negative health impacts of poor air quality.

label: Resistance
current_description: Ability to resist air quality degradation impacts.
revised_description: Capacity to resist negative health impacts of poor air quality.

label: COPD Prevalence
current_description: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease prevalence in the population.
revised_description: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) prevalence in the population.

label: Vulnerable Populations
current_description: Demographics of populations vulnerable to air quality impacts.
revised_description: Demographics of populations vulnerable to air quality impacts.

label: Vulnerable Workers
current_description: Employment in forestry, construction, or farmwork.
revised_description: Employment in forestry, construction, or farmwork.

label: Medical Infrastructure
current_description: Access to medical infrastructure and hospitals.
revised_description: Access to medical infrastructure and hospitals.
